market_pulse: Strong mid-week activity across Strip venues with notable talent announcements from OMNIA (DJ Pauly D, Fisher) and Hakkasan (R&Bae Wednesdays). Tech-house gaining traction with Zouk's Duke Dumont lineups. LIV maintains solid daytime presence but lacks headline-grabbing artist announcements this cycle.

content_gaps.description: Competitors posting confirmed artist lineups (Fisher, DJ Pauly D, Tiësto, Laidback Luke). LIV Beach lacking prominent secondary artist callouts.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Post confirmed upcoming DJ lineup posts with artist tags to boost discoverability and engagement on TikTok/IG Stories

content_gaps.description: Competitors using countdown stickers for Friday/Saturday events. LIV Beach shows minimal story activity this week.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch Friday night countdown stories (48h, 24h, 6h) with talent callouts to drive late-week buzz

content_gaps.description: #vegastiktok #vegasnightlife #cluboutfits trending across competitors. LIV Beach not leveraging branded UGC hashtags for repost collation.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create dedicated UGC hashtag (e.g., #LIVBeachVibes) and pin repost workflow in Stories weekly
